artifact_role: Repository-owned work and ranking portfolio. Durable Lane definitions and control state exist only in root LANES.yaml.

authority.cross_repo_program_sequencing_owner: JoeOps for Joe-attention-dependent decisions and orchestration; otherwise the governing owner or workflow
authority.external_data_adjudication_owner: phenomenology role, returned by frozen packet

selection_contract.score_scale: Each component is an integer from 1 to 5. Higher impact, information gain, readiness, distinctiveness, and time sensitivity help. Higher effort, wall risk, and duplication risk hurt.
selection_contract.score_formula: 2*impact + 2*information_gain + readiness + distinctiveness + time_sensitivity - effort - wall_risk - duplication_risk
selection_contract.deepest_open_problem_posture: The Y14 F_A C2 spectral-section/source-action datum and native normalization remain open and load-bearing. Joe transferred construction of that frontier to possibility-to-capability, so GU tracks but does not hourly attack it unless a frozen return or direct priority change occurs.
selection_contract.scheduling_rule: Lane number expresses purpose, not an automatic every-run schedule. Each Progress run selects the worthiest eligible work item across Lanes 1 through 3 using current evidence, dependencies, collision state, and the declared score. Selecting Lane 2 or Lane 3 does not demote or replace Lane 1.
selection_contract.end_of_run_rerank_rule: After execution and validation but before the receipt, re-rank eligible work inside the lane just worked, then re-rank Lanes 1 through 3 by their strongest eligible work. Append both rankings to the Next-Work Handoff. Lane A never enters the scientific ranking.
selection_contract.durable_priority_rule: Hourly re-ranking is advisory. Lane A Stewardship reconciles valid signals into this portfolio and the NEXT-STEPS front door.
invalid_switch_reasons: a maintenance lane produced more commits
selection_contract.prediction_package_interrupt: Standing rule (Joe direct chat 2026-07-19, council-reviewed): when the daily steward flags PREDICTION_PACKAGE_PENDING, the next Progress hourly takes the package work ahead of normal cross-lane ranking until FROZEN or a named blocker; time-boxed at ~3 cycles; admission criteria, freeze contract, and v2 supersession rules in lab/process/prediction-package-standing-rule.md. Retrodictions never package.
selection_contract.difficulty_demotion_reconciliation_flag: 2026-07-21 Joe/scoping finding: score_formula subtracts effort+wall_risk, demoting Lane-1 theorem work (OPERATOR-END-PENCIL 18, B5 20) below the safe lattice item (25), which is why the hourly kept selecting enumeration. Contradicts lane_one_is_protected_from_difficulty_demotion. Lane-A steward to reconcile: exempt Lane-1 North-Star items from the effort/wall-risk subtraction OR gate difficulty-driven demotion behind an explicit steward note. No formula edit made autonomously.

run_id_policy.w_series: Historical research identifiers. Automated and direct Progress runs must not allocate a new W number.
run_id_policy.reason: The direct-chat and hourly workstreams consumed one W-number sequence and collided repeatedly. Namespaced run IDs remove the collision without a remote lock service.

shared_surface_owners.explorations/W227-gap-analysis-to-uncond: historical input, not a live steering register
shared_surface_owners.steward/runs/: the run that created the plan; ignored operational record

required_source_fields: source-issued packet id and schema version
content SHA-256 manifest computed from git-object bytes
native, imported, fitted, and free quantities separated
live_good_stable_conditions: Proposition 1: good-stable means invariant Krein positive majorant or relatively compact image
phenomenology_return_fields: likelihood, covariance, priors, and nuisance treatment
packet_seam.phenomenology_intake_guard: Reject or return any packet that explicitly or implicitly converts fit quality, parameter freedom, mimicry, or data preference into a GU native-versus-forced judgment. GU performs that classification independently after intake.

publication_seed_seam.discovery_rule: When GU identifies a credible paper-shaped opportunity, send a minimal seed proposal to the Drafting Factory mailbox immediately. Do not wait for full hardening and do not open a parallel GU publication-priority queue.
publication_seed_seam.seed_is_not: A seed is not a drafting authorization, novelty verdict, claim-grade change, publication decision, or JoeOps notification.
minimum_seed_fields: working title and stable seed slug
GU source revision and durable evidence pointers
verbatim current grade and open conditionalities
publication_seed_seam.return_rule: Only after Drafting Factory has production capacity and selects the seed may it send GU a scoped hardening proposal. The daily GU steward treats that proposal as a valid priority signal, not a command, and decides its weight against the protected research portfolio.
publication_seed_seam.hardening_return: GU returns source-owned proof, novelty, citation, reproducibility, or scope work through a frozen provenance-bearing packet. Drafting Factory owns drafting priority; GU retains research grade, native-versus-forced, and claim-status authority.

joeops_signal_triggers: major claim killed, downgraded, or unexpectedly strengthened
paper package ready for external eyes
outside expert, paid data, or external action needed
p2c packet return materially changes the GU frontier
same hard blocker survives three daily steward reviews
concurrent work cannot be reconciled without Joe

work_items.title: Test one frozen GU construction against quantum, Standard Model, gravitational, and cosmological recovery
work_items.assessment_summary: The recovery contract has a branch-local construction manifest and action fingerprint. The exact-vacuum GR, cosmological scalar-truncation, and complete-Standard-Model selector defenses each completed history audit plus three broad swings and currently stand as bounded branch-local no-gos. The QM physical-sector interleave returned CONDITIONAL_FAIL. Lane 1 remains protected, but the registered recovery-defense set has no automatic next swing until a fresh source-owned recovery fork, frozen p2c return, or explicit new registered component appears.
work_items.construction_fork: Use one frozen set of GU-native objects, equations, parameters, quotient data, and explicit conditional assumptions. Compare that construction against standard physics benchmarks without silently replacing GU objects by familiar effective-field-theory objects or adjusting a different construction in each sector.
work_items.next_swing: Do not rerun the completed NO-GO-SCOPE-CHALLENGE set. Current GR, cosmology, and Standard Model targets are BOUNDED_NO_GO in the defense register, and the QM-PHYSICAL-SECTOR interleave is COMPLETE_CONDITIONAL_FAIL. Reopen recovery-certification hourly work only on a fresh branch-local no-go target, new source-owned recovery fork, frozen p2c return, or explicit daily-steward portfolio signal. CONSTRUCTION-SPACE-EXPLORATION is the active generator of those new registered targets; when it freezes a multi-sector candidate, that candidate reopens this item. Otherwise compare the currently eligible Lane 2 and Lane 3 leaders.
work_items.kill_condition: If recovering the tested sectors requires sector-specific adjustable identifications, couplings, boundary conditions, normalizations, or incompatible versions of the construction, downgrade the unified-recovery claim at the current grade and record exactly what weaker compatibility or embedding result survives.
work_items.switch_condition: After every swing, re-rank the recovery components inside Lane 1, then compare Lane 1's strongest eligible work with the strongest eligible work in Lanes 2 and 3. A scheduling switch does not demote Lane 1's protected purpose.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Subgroup containment, field location, matching names, parameter fitting, background-curve agreement, or sector-specific ansatz choices do not establish physical recovery. Compatibility is not derivation, and an imported standard model is not a GU prediction.

internal_rerank_contract.ranking_formula: 2*impact + 2*information_gain + readiness + distinctiveness + time_sensitivity - effort - wall_risk - duplication_risk
internal_rerank_contract.handoff_rule: The current run reads the latest Next-Work Handoff, executes the highest-ranked unblocked recovery component unless new evidence invalidates it, writes a fresh Lane 1 internal ranking, and then participates in the cross-lane ranking before its receipt.
internal_rerank_contract.extra_effort_rule: A maintainer-directed or separately scoped automation may add effort to one work item without creating another lane or silently changing portfolio authority.

no_go_defense_contract.six_axis_scope_check: Use Layer 0 semantic alignment plus L1-L7. Compare prior clearances by signature and require explicit axis deltas plus a first falsification test for every Swing-2 escape candidate.
no_go_defense_contract.legitimate_reframe_rule: A legitimate reframe explains more; a degenerate reframe merely survives.
no_go_defense_contract.preservation_rule: A survivor creates a new frozen construction candidate and does not erase the original branch-local no-go.
no_go_defense_contract.integrity_conflict_rule: If repo history already cleared the same obstruction for the same frozen construction, reconcile the premises before banking or defending the new no-go.

internal_work_items.title: Audit history and challenge branch-local recovery no-gos across predeclared construction classes
internal_work_items.resume_after_interleave: Complete Swing 2 and Swing 3 for every non-exhausted registered no-go target.
internal_work_items.next_swing: The current registered target set is complete: GR, cosmology, and Standard Model each reached BOUNDED_NO_GO after history audit plus three broad swings. Reopen only for a fresh branch-local no-go target, new source-owned recovery fork, frozen p2c return, or explicit daily-steward portfolio signal.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The predeclared construction space is exhausted after history reconciliation, a typed scope pass, a genuinely different construction attempt, and adversarial adjudication. Record the bounded or class-exhausted no-go plus an exact resurrection trigger.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count keyword search, persona voting, relabeling, coefficient fitting, target-theory import, or a reframe that only survives as one of the three broad swings.

internal_work_items.title: Freeze the construction identity, recovery ladder, and evidence matrix
internal_work_items.next_swing: The branch-local manifest and action fingerprint exist. Reopen contract construction only if the no-go defense produces a new source-owned fork or the daily steward identifies an unresolved identity conflict.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: If no single construction can be frozen because the sector claims rely on mutually incompatible objects or assumptions, record that as the first unified-recovery failure rather than normalizing the variants away.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not merge results from different revisions, forks, or assumption sets into one apparent construction.

internal_work_items.title: Establish or kill a complete low-energy Standard Model sector
internal_work_items.next_swing: Current defense checkpoint is BOUNDED_NO_GO in the register. Reopen only if a new source-owned selector fork, frozen adapter packet, or explicit registered target changes the construction space.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: A representation embedding without a dynamically closed, anomaly-safe, correctly coupled low-energy sector fails the complete-Standard-Model recovery claim.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not infer the Standard Model from subgroup containment or a matching field-count table.

internal_work_items.title: Recover Einstein dynamics and benchmark gravitational observables
internal_work_items.next_swing: Current defense checkpoint is BOUNDED_NO_GO in the register. Reopen only if a new source-owned GR recovery fork, frozen adapter packet, or explicit registered target changes the construction space.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Stationary Schwarzschild or Kerr compatibility without controlled Einstein dynamics, sourced perturbations, and benchmark observables is insufficient and closes the strong recovery wording.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not promote a solution-shaped projected shadow or background metric match into recovery of general relativity.

internal_work_items.title: Test whether a supplied boundary adapter is sufficient to construct the physical quantum sector
internal_work_items.conditional_input_question: Assume a precisely typed boundary adapter and favorable branch inputs are supplied. Does the same frozen GU construction then produce the physical field complex, BRST or constraint quotient, positive state space, observables, probabilities, locality, and unitary or state-preserving dynamics without any further sector-specific import?
internal_work_items.next_swing: The current conditional sufficiency certificate is COMPLETE_CONDITIONAL_FAIL: even with a typed boundary adapter axiom, the branch lacks source-owned quotient, state, observable, probability, locality, and dynamics certificates. Reopen only on a stronger frozen adapter/source packet or explicit new branch input.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Failure of positivity, constraint compatibility, unitarity, or causal observables even under the explicit adapter assumption kills that conditional realization; success remains assumption-capped.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not equate an indefinite Krein arena, a selected sign, or a formal BRST complex with a constructed physical Hilbert space.

internal_work_items.title: Derive cosmological perturbations and observable transfer
internal_work_items.next_swing: Current defense checkpoint is BOUNDED_NO_GO in the register. Reopen only if a new source-owned scalar perturbation fork, frozen adapter packet, or explicit registered target changes the construction space.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: No scalar singlet or no dynamically closed scalar truncation means the current theta-background Klein-Gordon equation is the wrong physical equation. A fitted background without stable perturbations and observable transfer also fails cosmological recovery.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count agreement with a background expansion curve as recovery of cosmology.

internal_work_items.title: Certify an independently constructed boundary-adapter return
internal_work_items.next_swing: When p2c returns a frozen packet, verify provenance, independence from the GU result it is meant to enable, exact interface typing, branch assumptions, and whether the same frozen GU construction consumes it without sector-specific repair.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: A circular adapter, an interface mismatch, or an adapter that works only after retuning the GU construction fails the independent-adapter condition.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: GU may audit a frozen p2c return but must not construct the adapter here, assume that a conditional consequence proves it exists, or erase Proposition 1 and record-bit conditions.

work_items.title: Systematically explore the construction space with sector-fit searches and weave surviving candidates
work_items.assessment_summary: Joe-authorized 2026-07-19 (direct chat, option A). The completed defense set bounded the current branch's no-gos but left reopening passive: nothing owned generating new constructions. This item makes the search first-class: map the predeclared construction space on the six-axis template, run per-sector fit searches (SM selector, QM physical sector, GR vacuum cancellation, cosmology scalar) as candidate generators, and weave multi-sector survivors into frozen candidates for the recovery ladder. Amended 2026-07-19 (Joe direct chat, option A): sector-fit admission moved from natively-produce to a graded fit ladder - Rung 0 consistency against sharp per-sector constraint lists is the admission bar, Rung 1 hosting with typed and counted imports, Rung 2 native selection reserved as survivor grading and the North Star bar. The program's falsification target is the joint intersection: an empty Rung-0 intersection over the fully dispositioned predeclared space is the real falsification-shaped result; prior no-gos are boundary data that carve the map, not verdicts on GU.
work_items.construction_fork: This item searches the fork space itself. Every probe names its cell's axis signature and which side of the standard-field versus program-native fork it occupies. Sector-fit candidates require explicit axis deltas from tested cells and a first falsification test at birth.
work_items.next_swing: P-LATTICE-SIGNATURE-RESOLUTION-C1 resolves only L5: the manifest supports C1 as a specific-object substrate on the program-native side. The other seven C1 axes remain source-gapped, leaving 87 unresolved lattice slots and no admissible inheritance propagation or enumeration. Next lattice step is P-LATTICE-C1-SOURCE-PACKET: require an owner-grade semantic comparison, substrate classification, observer/extraction pairing, causal order, coordination loop, and Krein superselection/probability specification. Until that packet exists, P-OBS-LEG is the strongest independent Lane 2 alternative. B5 remains parked at its source gap; signature choice remains Joe-gated.
work_items.kill_condition: If the predeclared construction space reaches full disposition and the joint Rung-0 intersection across the four sector tracks is empty, and the council cannot name a legitimate reparameterization that explains more, hand the exhaustion question to the daily steward and Joe; this item never enters the exhaustion verdict itself. A single cell or track failure is boundary data, never a kill.
work_items.switch_condition: After each stage boundary (map round, sector-track round, weave), rerank inside Lane 1 and then across lanes per the standard contract. Sector tracks are one workstream with an internal rotation, not sublanes.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: A sector fit at any rung is a candidate, not a recovery claim, and claim strength always equals the rung achieved. Rung 0 means passing the track's frozen sharp constraint list; subgroup containment, matching names, field location, or parameter fitting never count as consistency. Imports at Rung 1 are typed and counted, never hidden. Council output guides search and is never evidence for or against GU. No cell is silently revisited; reopening a dispositioned cell requires the history audit. Weakening a sharp constraint list is Joe-gated.

internal_rerank_contract.ranking_formula: 2*impact + 2*information_gain + readiness + distinctiveness + time_sensitivity - effort - wall_risk - duplication_risk
internal_rerank_contract.handoff_rule: Each run reads the map and the latest council search plan, executes the highest-information-gain unblocked probe, updates the map disposition with evidence pointers, and reranks before its receipt.
internal_rerank_contract.council_rule: At every stage boundary run the search-strategy council as an inline persona pass in one worker (members reason independently, rank, chairman synthesizes; never one agent per persona). Record the ranked search plan in the map file.

exploration_contract.breadth_first_rule: No second deep probe on a cell while a reachable untested cell in the same track has a cheaper first probe, unless the council explicitly ranks depth higher with stated information-gain reasoning.
exploration_contract.weave_rule: A construction whose joint grade reaches Rung 1 or better on two or more sectors becomes a frozen candidate and enters RECOVERY-CERTIFICATION as a new registered target, satisfying the defense register's reopen conditions.
exploration_contract.truth_standard_unchanged: Target-free construction, native-versus-imported typing, adversarial twins, and Joe-gated verdict changes are unchanged; this item changes search strategy only.
exploration_contract.fit_ladder: Rung 0 consistency (admission; sharp constraint lists only), Rung 1 hosting (typed + counted imports), Rung 2 native selection (North Star bar; survivor grading only, never the entry gate).
exploration_contract.intersection_rule: The falsification target is the joint intersection: empty Rung-0 intersection over the fully dispositioned predeclared space is the falsification-shaped result; a non-empty intersection characterizes what a GU construction must be, and driving its import count toward zero is the march toward the Rung-2 rigidity claim.
exploration_contract.expressiveness_guard: If a track's Rung-0 pass kills nothing across many cells, its constraint list is too weak: the council must sharpen it before the track continues. Expressiveness is priced by import counting, never mistaken for truth.
exploration_contract.conditional_interior_rule: The source-owned object is a typed interface import until a concrete instance exists. Tracks grade cells R0_COND/R1_COND against the frozen interface contract; integration validates conditional grades when an instance arrives. The interface spec itself is falsifiable: mutually inconsistent leg demands kill the predeclared class without the object.

work_items.standing_axiom: lab/process/boundary-adapter-standing-axiom.md â€” the boundary adapter is assumed; "needs adapter" is never a stop, gate, or no-worthy-work reason; record the demand on the channel parameter card and continue.

channel_structure.authority: Joe direct chat 2026-07-19 (drafting-factory channel pattern applied to Lane 1; supersedes one_workstream_not_sublanes for this item)
channel_structure.channel_contract: Each channel is guided by its hypothesis (explorations/adapter-assumed-four-leg-swing-2026-07-19.md) and produces a frozen PARAMETER CARD: (a) construction parameters for its sector to fit within GU, (b) realistic adapter parameters that sector demands. Channels never stop on adapter-needed.
channel_structure.integration_barrier: All four parameter cards frozen -> lane updates to integration: weld cards, verify shared minimal payload (target N<=4), route to p2c.
channel_structure.readiness_scorecard: lab/process/integration-readiness-scorecard.md â€” three questions per leg (construction exists? parameter boundaries known? adapter range known?); channels update rows as evidence moves; integration when all rows YES and the welded payload passes consistency.
channel_structure.ch_src_contract: CH-SRC (Joe direct chat 2026-07-19): the source-action build channel â€” a LAGGING INTEGRATOR. It attempts the minimal source-action skeleton (2026-06-27 spec B.1-B.4: (S,S)=0; Noether identity forcing delta_2.d_RS,-1=0; non-equivariant compensator sigma_c; cohomological realization) and continuously consumes the other five channels' cards to narrow the build parameters. It maintains the build-parameter ledger (lab/process/source-action-build-ledger.md): every frozen demand from other channels (DEM-GR-*, T3, J_quat typing, scale bracket, chain-representation demands) lands there as a build constraint. CH-SRC never blocks the other channels and never stops on adapter-needed; its own card freezes when the skeleton either exists at toy grade or is obstructed by a named computed conflict.
channel_structure.signature_competition: Joe direct chat 2026-07-19: CH-SIG-95 and CH-SIG-77 each weld ALL leg findings in their signature and push toward a full construction; head-to-head cleanliness comparison (legs fitting, payload N, forced imports, kill survivals). Signature-pure internally; K6 guards the weld; final signature verdict is Joe-gated. Integration barrier updated: both signature channels report before integration concludes.

work_items.lead_note: No longer the Lane-1 default (Joe 2026-07-21). C1 showed the lattice non-generative pending a source packet; that packet is what the SOURCE-DOMAIN-SELECTOR swing (OPERATOR-END-PENCIL lead) produces. Remains available; not disabled.

work_items.title: Count basis-invariant Yukawa freedom
work_items.construction_fork: Use the GU-native symmetry, quotient, and source constraints. Compare, but do not silently replace them with, the standard SM effective-field-theory parameterization.
work_items.current_authority: GUH-20260716T000420Z-flavor-rank found that the GU Z/3 texture reduces nine complex Yukawa entries to three complex coefficients, but phase and overall-scale quotienting still leaves two free dimensionless ratios. No zero-parameter flavor invariant survives at the current construction grade.
work_items.next_swing: None at the current construction grade. Preserve the exact residual dimension and reopen only if a new GU-native constraint removes the remaining invariant freedom before data confrontation.
work_items.kill_condition: Any independent GU-specific coefficient that can absorb the proposed mass or mixing relation kills the zero-parameter prediction family at the current construction grade.
work_items.switch_condition: Reopen only if a new native symmetry, quotient, source equation, or independently fixed coefficient removes the two residual dimensionless ratios without using flavor data.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count a texture support pattern, fitted coefficient, basis-dependent zero, or imported observed mass as a prediction.

work_items.title: Find normalization and field-rescaling invariants
work_items.construction_fork: Use the native DeWitt/gimmel ratio-only geometry and the built source coefficients. Do not import a standard massive-spin-2 normalization as if GU fixed it.
work_items.current_authority: GUH-20260716T021308Z-norm-rank found four invariant quotient families but no GU-native absolute scale. Fixed-range gravity and fixed-pole-scale predictions remain unavailable at the current construction grade.
work_items.next_swing: None at the current construction grade. Preserve the invariant quotient and reopen only when native source dynamics or another independently derived datum fixes an absolute normalization.
work_items.kill_condition: If no absolute dimensionless relation survives, close the fixed-range gravity and fixed-pole-scale prediction routes until new native dynamics is supplied.
work_items.switch_condition: Reopen only on new native dynamics or a frozen independently derived normalization datum, then freeze any resulting relation before target-data confrontation.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not use the observed dark-energy density or an experimental target to select the normalization. A rank calculation can locate surviving invariants but does not by itself construct the open native source datum.

work_items.title: Confront a frozen flavor invariant
work_items.current_authority: The prerequisite zero-parameter PRED-FLAVOR-RANK invariant did not survive. There is no honest frozen flavor relation to confront with PDG data at the current construction grade.
work_items.next_swing: None. Reopen only after PRED-FLAVOR-RANK is reopened by new native structure and produces a frozen data-blind invariant.
work_items.kill_condition: Any adjustable coefficient, basis dependence, or post-data reformulation kills the candidate.
work_items.switch_condition: Reopen only on a frozen zero-parameter FLAVOR-RANK survivor produced without target-data calibration.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: No data inspection before the relation and uncertainty treatment are frozen.

work_items.title: Derive at least one presently free quantity
work_items.next_swing: On a new native constraint or normalization datum, identify a parameter currently free in the relevant benchmark theory, derive it from the frozen construction, and freeze the relation before target-data inspection.
work_items.kill_condition: Any independent coefficient, imported datum, fitted normalization, or post-data choice that can absorb the value kills the fixed-quantity claim.
work_items.switch_condition: Activate only when new native structure removes a presently free quantity before target-data inspection.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not count a reduced parameter space, a fitted best value, or a quotient invariant without an absolute prediction as fixing a quantity.

work_items.title: Freeze and confront a blind distinctive prediction
work_items.next_swing: Predeclare the native observable, numerical relation, uncertainty treatment, competitor baseline, and kill threshold, then confront independent holdout data without recalibration.
work_items.kill_condition: Calibration to the target, equivalent freedom in a standard effective theory, a failed holdout, or a post-hoc reformulation kills the blind distinctive prediction claim.
work_items.switch_condition: Activate only after FIXED-NATIVE-QUANTITY yields a frozen data-blind relation.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Compatibility, a one-sided survival tripwire, and a scheduled future dataset do not by themselves constitute a blind GU prediction.

work_items.title: Assemble one or two candidate prediction packets, honestly graded, even if not fully ready
work_items.assessment_summary: Joe direct chat 2026-07-19: put pressure on the predictions lane to hold real candidate predictions even if not fully ready. The fanout produced candidates: (1) the DE-sign orientation readout â€” sgn(w0+1) as the relational readout of the payload Z/2, conditional on f0 != 0 and a derived co-variance (freeze the prediction shape BEFORE any data confrontation, per pre-registration discipline); (2) the matter-parity Z/2 emitted by the 126 spinorial rank-drop route â€” a stable parity-odd state is a dark-matter-shaped candidate; (3) the standing DE-F1 one-sided ceiling (already frozen). Records-track-curvature stays too soft to packet. Joe direct chat (late evening): candidate packet 3 recovered from the 2026-07-07 mirror-sector table (BIG-SWING-MIRROR-PREDICTIONS-CHARGED-CONSTRAINED): a heavy, charged+colored, family-identical vectorlike mirror replica, count = generations, hidden by mass alone â€” detection signature is a single vectorlike fermion matching the family-identical pattern at any reachable collider scale; absolute mass stays dynamics-gated. Tonight's causality result (clean decoupling is VZ-acausal; the ghost is required) may upgrade 'mu free' to 'mu finite' â€” the mirror cannot be decoupled to infinity. Two weld probes before packet freeze: (W-A) is the phi*Pi_mirror gapping condensate the same object as the C10 curvature-locked VEV (the 54-weld in different clothes)? (W-B) is M4's spectrally-invisible sign bit the payload Z/2?
work_items.construction_fork: Each packet must type its claims: what is GU-native, what is conditional on which channel card, what is imported. A packet is a frozen candidate prediction with named conditions, not a claim of readiness.
work_items.next_swing: Draft packet 1 (DE-sign orientation readout): predeclare observable, sign convention, conditions (f0 != 0, derived co-variance from the C10 action), competitor baseline, and kill threshold â€” frozen before any likelihood work. Draft packet 2 (matter-parity candidate): state the 126-route condition chain and what observation classes would bear on a stable parity-odd state. Grade both honestly as CONDITIONAL; route nothing externally. Packet 3 (mirror sector): before freezing, run weld probes W-A (condensate = C10 VEV?) and W-B (M4 sign bit = payload orientation?); if the causality argument binds dynamically, state the upgraded claim (finite mu, structurally required mirror) with its exact conditions; collider bound classes stay from-memory-flagged until a literature freeze.
work_items.kill_condition: A packet that cannot state its conditions and kill threshold without hedging is not a packet; drop it back to the channel card it depends on.
work_items.switch_condition: Rerank within Lane 2 after each packet freeze; DE-AMP-DIAGNOSTIC remains the data-facing audit and is not displaced.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: No data peeking before packet freeze; no promotion of conditional packets to predictions in any external-facing surface; retrodictions (hypercharge, trace reversal) are logged as coherence, never packaged as predictions.

work_items.title: Audit the CMB-calibrated dark-energy amplitude
work_items.owner: GU structural inputs plus phenomenology return packet
work_items.next_swing: Re-solve theta-star with GU's own full D_M(z-star), including the high-redshift tail, then return a blind official-H46B likelihood adjudication.
work_items.kill_condition: If the corrected canonical amplitude remains strongly disfavored, close the positive raw-BAO amplitude leg. If it moves, report the shift without calling it a new prediction.
work_items.switch_condition: Close after one complete normalization and likelihood audit. It does not outrank protected Lane 1 without a new valid priority signal or a current cross-lane ranking that makes it the strongest eligible swing.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: This is data hygiene and compatibility testing, not a decisive or distinctive GU prediction. Only H46B-verified likelihood inputs may seed the calculation.

work_items.title: Monitor the one-sided dark-energy amplitude ceiling
work_items.owner: gu-formalization defines the tripwire; phenomenology supplies verified data
work_items.current_authority: W226 supersedes W223 for the firing statistic. The current preregistered two-sigma edge margin is +1.11. W223's +0.032 was the DESY5 central-value margin and is not the firing margin.
work_items.evidence_source: explorations/W226-harden-de-tripwire-squeeze-data-2026-07-14.md and tests/W226_de_tripwire.py; any frozen monitor packet must cite and rerun these sources rather than copy the config constant.
work_items.next_swing: On an official new data release, verify provenance, add the frozen row to the existing monitor, and evaluate the predeclared two-sigma edge without retuning GU.
work_items.kill_condition: F1 fires only if an admissible data combination excludes w_a/(w_0+1) > -3.5 at two sigma, meaning its least-negative two-sigma edge is below -3.5.
work_items.switch_condition: No hourly run before verified new data. A fired tripwire is a Joe signal and a scientific-status review point.
work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Call this a one-sided falsification tripwire, never a positive GU prediction. Do not use a central value as the two-sigma firing statistic.

work_items.title: Formalize stable finite proof kernels
work_items.next_swing: First establish a fresh default-target lake build baseline through the required host-local wrapper. Then fold the already-written sorry-free and axiom-free R4_TwoArena certificate into the default target and retire the un-typechecked A1 draft duplicate so it cannot be cited as a certificate. Only after those cheap integrity wins specify the W243/GU-002 extremal-weight kernel.
